description: Implemented real autocorrect for Performance/ReverseEach (reverse.each -> reverse_each) with fixture autocorrect coverage and kept offense invariant on runtime guard workload.

asi.hypothesis: Performance/ReverseEach has a deterministic one-to-one replacement (`reverse.each` to `reverse_each`) for already-safe offense cases, so adding autocorrect should reduce missing count by 1 with no runtime regression.

description: Implemented autocorrect for Performance/UriDefaultParser by mirroring RuboCop behavior (URI::Parser.new -> URI::DEFAULT_PARSER, preserving optional leading ::) with corrected fixture coverage.

description: Added autocorrect for Performance/Size by following RuboCop selector replacement semantics (`count` -> `size`) only on existing safe receiver patterns, with corrected fixture coverage.

description: Implemented autocorrect for Performance/ReverseFirst by mirroring RuboCop range replacement semantics (`reverse.first` -> `last`, `reverse.first(n)` -> `last(n).reverse`) with fixture autocorrect tests.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/SyntaxMethods. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/FactoryNameStyle. asi.next_action_hint: Continue with factory_bot cops that have AutoCorrector and similarly local edits (e.g., consistent_parentheses_style/factory_class_name) before heavier structural rewrites.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/FactoryClassName. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/IdSequence. For `sequence :id` offenses, autocorrect now removes the offending sequence call statement range (including indentation/newline when safe), preserving surrounding factory body content. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/RedundantFactoryOption. For matching `association :name, factory: :name` (and `%i[name]`) offenses, autocorrect now removes just the redundant `factory:` pair with surrounding comma/space handling (left-comma preferred, right-comma fallback), preserving other options. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/AttributeDefinedStatically. For deterministic single-argument static attribute calls, autocorrect now wraps the value in a block (`title "x"` -> `title { "x" }`, and parenthesized calls convert parens to braces). Kept a safety guard to skip hash-without-braces argument forms. Added supports_autocorrect and focused autocorrect test; offense invariant remains 3992.

asi.next_action_hint: Continue with low-risk FactoryBot cops; consider parity expansion for bare-hash arg wrapping (`foo key: val` -> `foo { { key: val } }`) in a follow-up with explicit fixture coverage.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/ConsistentParenthesesStyle. Baseline corrections now (a) add parentheses for require style by replacing inter-token gap before first arg and appending closing paren after args, and (b) remove opening/closing parens for omit style when existing offense guards pass (same-line arg, no value-omission hash). Added supports_autocorrect and focused style-specific autocorrect tests; offense invariant remains 3992.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for FactoryBot/CreateList (n_times style baseline). For deterministic `create_list(...)` offenses under `EnforcedStyle: n_times`, autocorrect now rewrites whole call to `N.times.map { create(...) }`, preserving receiver prefix and argument list text. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/EmptyExampleGroup. description: Added conservative nitrocop autocorrect baseline for FactoryBot/FactoryAssociationWithStrategy. For deterministic single-argument hardcoded strategy calls inside association blocks (`create|build|build_stubbed(:profile)`), autocorrect now rewrites inner call to `association(:profile)` while preserving offense detection behavior. Added supports_autocorrect and focused autocorrect test; offense invariant remains 3992.

asi.hypothesis: FactoryAssociationWithStrategy can safely gain baseline autocorrect for the narrowest deterministic case by replacing hardcoded strategy calls with inline `association(...)`.
asi.safety_guard: Correction only applies to single symbol/string argument strategy calls; multi-arg/procedural forms remain diagnostic-only.
asi.next_action_hint: Only FactoryBot/ExcessiveCreateList remains missing in factory_bot. Decide whether to leave it diagnostic-only (upstream no autocorrect) or add explicit nitrocop policy for unsafe correction.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect baseline for RSpec/ReceiveMessages. For deterministic repeated-stub groups (same receiver, unique symbol message keys, multi-line), autocorrect now collapses stubs into a single `allow(...).to receive_messages(...)` statement and removes the redundant sibling stub lines. Added supports_autocorrect and focused autocorrect test; offense invariant remains 3992.

description: Added conservative autocorrect baseline for RSpec/VerifiedDoubles. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/EmptyLineAfterFinalLet. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/AlignLeftLetBrace. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/AlignRightLetBrace. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/ExcessiveDocstringSpacing. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/MetadataStyle (symbol style baseline). description: Added RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/VariableDefinition. description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/ImplicitSubject. Existing implicit-subject offenses (`is_expected`, `should`, `should_not`) now autocorrect by selector replacement to explicit-subject forms (`expect(subject)`, `.to`, `.not_to`). asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect only applies to currently-detected implicit-subject send selectors; no require_implicit style rewrites were added.

description: Added RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/MultipleSubjects. Overwritten `subject(:name)` declarations now autocorrect selector `subject`->`let`; overwritten unnamed `subject { ... }` declarations are removed by node-range deletion; `subject!` remains diagnostic-only. Added supports_autocorrect and focused tests for both correction modes; offense invariant stayed 3992.

asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect only applies to overwritten declarations (all but last subject in group) and explicitly skips `subject!`.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/IteratedExpectation. For deterministic single-expectation `.each` offenses, autocorrect now rewrites full iteration calls to `expect(collection).to all(matcher)` when matcher does not reference the block param; multi-expectation cases remain diagnostic-only. Added supports_autocorrect, corrected fixture, and focused tests.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/HooksBeforeExamples. Baseline autocorrect now moves the first deterministic offending hook statement in an example group above the first example/include-example boundary via stable contiguous-range rewrite; remaining offenses stay diagnostic-only in that pass. asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect currently applies only one hook move per group per run to avoid overlapping move corrections; diagnostics still report all offenses.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/LetBeforeExamples. Baseline autocorrect moves the first deterministic offending let/let! statement in an example group before the first example boundary via contiguous-range reorder, and skips autocorrect when include-example calls are present (matching RuboCop’s conservative behavior). Added supports_autocorrect and focused move test.

asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect currently performs one move per group and is disabled for groups containing include-example calls to avoid unsafe reorder semantics.
asi.learning: Using a single contiguous replacement (from first-example insertion point through moved statement end) avoids offset-order issues from separate insert/delete corrections.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/ScatteredLet. Baseline autocorrect now moves the first deterministic scattered let/let! declaration per group to immediately follow the initial let block via contiguous-range reorder (including block-pass let forms), while remaining offenses in the same pass stay diagnostic-only.

asi.hypothesis: ScatteredLet can safely gain baseline autocorrect by relocating one scattered let declaration after the first let anchor using stable source-range reorder and existing let-form guards.
asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect performs at most one move per example group per pass to avoid overlapping reorder corrections.
asi.learning: Using anchor-at-first-let-end plus contiguous replacement preserves indentation and avoids insert/delete offset races.

description: Added conservative RuboCop-aligned autocorrect support for RSpec/ScatteredSetup. Baseline autocorrect now merges one repeated hook occurrence per duplicate hook group by appending the later hook body into the first hook body and removing the moved hook statement line; around hooks/class-method hooks/unknown-scope hooks remain guarded by existing logic.

asi.hypothesis: ScatteredSetup can safely gain baseline autocorrect by performing one deterministic merge per duplicate hook group (insert body text after first hook body, remove moved hook line) while retaining existing scope/metadata and safety guards.
asi.safety_guard: Autocorrect performs at most one merge per duplicate group per pass to avoid overlapping multi-merge edits.
asi.learning: Hook-body insertion + whole-line removal gives stable baseline merges without offset collisions.
